narrowed.reason: Migration replaces MUI v4 JSS-based `classes` map with the `withClasses` Tailwind-routing shim (per docs/migration/decisions/classes-shim.md). The public Button now declares an explicit slot-key set; consumer code that previously assigned arbitrary string keys is narrowed to the declared slots. Per the audit (May 2026) Button is in the strict-preservation set: it was already exposing `classes` via StandardProps, and consumers in the 23-repo portfolio rely on this prop.
narrowed.notes: Slot keys: 'root' (outermost button element), 'label' (text-content wrapper inside the button), 'icon' (cloned icon element regardless of position). Consumers using only these keys see no behavioral change. Consumers using non-slot keys silently no-op at runtime (TS catches at the consumer call-site).
